description_long: This doll features a smooth, elongated black body with a rounded top and a white, oval face. The face is adorned with simple, minimalistic features: two black eyes, a small mouth, and pink blush marks on the cheeks. One arm is slightly extended forward, holding a small pink heart-shaped object, while the other arm is tucked close to the body. The overall design is reminiscent of a cloaked or robed figure, with the black exterior enveloping the form. The surface appears glossy and seamless, giving the doll a modern, stylized appearance. The doll's compact size and lightweight construction suggest it is intended as a decorative or collectible item.
description: A sleek, black-robed doll with a white, minimalist face and pink blush, holding a small pink heart. The design is smooth, glossy, and stylized, evoking a cloaked figure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white face with black eyes, pink blush, and a small mouth, as well as the extended arm holding a pink heart.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated black body, the protruding arm with the heart, and the smooth, seamless surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted, glossy black surface with no facial features or arms visible.
description_view_3: Angled back view showing the curvature of the body, the side of the face, and the arm extending forward.
attribute_clothing_style: A long, seamless black robe or cloak with no visible seams, patterns, or fastenings, enveloping the entire body except for the face. The style is minimalist and reminiscent of animated fantasy characters.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with one arm extended forward holding a heart, while the other arm is close to the body. The head is facing forward, and the body is static and vertical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with a small, closed mouth, round black eyes, and pink blush marks on the cheeks, conveying a calm and gentle demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is fully covered by the smooth, black robe or cloak.
